name: focusflow
description: Pomodoro + Kanban productivity app with Obsidian sync
author: FocusFlow

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.build:main: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('dist-electron/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'})); fs.cpSync('main/assets', 'dist-electron/assets', {recursive:true}); console.log('[build] assets copiados → dist-electron/assets/')"
scripts.pack:exe: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.pack:msi: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win msi --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.pack:all: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win nsis msi --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.test: npm run test:renderer && npm run test:main
